Earthen Blade  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 50
DMG: 26 Dmg Bonus: 168
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Haste (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 25
WT: 8.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

A Lowbie's Dream
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2003 at 11:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1610928999014
12 posts
Lol i just bought this for 25pp =) as a 28 warrior i was using AXE OF LOST SOULS. Lovely wep but to slow for a 28 warrior...i hit once for every 7-8 times the mob hits =( haste is a must atm but withthis =) will proc and i will be fine. afterwards gonna move on to Executioners axe. (which procs 31% haste at 30) and have fun when that gets old or weak then switch back to Lost souls. but very nice axe =)



Kilrath~ 28th Battle Warrior!unseasoned veteran=D
Shaokahn~ 53rd Season Shaman!Pride Heyokah
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 05 2003 at 3:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This Weapon is Crap, I have had it for 5 days and almost continues use, my Skill never went up,It never proc'd for me, And instead of speeding up the damage it increased my miss',though when I did hit, it was fairly high,
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 26 2003 at 9:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) /boggle did you just say that the weapon never proc'd?? might have something to do with there being no proc on it.
RE: It's Crap
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2018 at 3:45 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
The proc is Haste. It is casted haste not worn haste.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
Haste proc
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2003 at 11:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252196447
1 post
This weapon has a haste proc, and it begins procc-ing at lvl 25. This is a solid weapon, about the best you can get for shear damage for a warr under lvl 30 (unless you are self or guild twinked). Think of it as a baby weighted pole arm.

Sheimus McVicious
33d Season Warr
Mith Marr
▲ Page top
What Proc?
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2003 at 5:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785911774
10 posts
I don't understand what everyone is talking about "when does this weapon Proc"? I don't see any proc ability on this weapon. I have one in the bank but being a Ranger I can't use it. The only thing I see is that it is a haste item so it would therefore hasten your attacks. The haste is rated at 20%.
▲ Page top
RE: What Proc?
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2003 at 11:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758665328
36 posts
You are mistaken Tonelicar. You're thinking of Effect: Haste (Worn), which behaves like you describe. Effect: Haste (Combat) should indeed be a proc, and is what the axe has.
▲ Page top
RE: What Proc?
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2003 at 12:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256700437
Scholar
164 posts
The haste will not take effect unless you are at least the minimum level for it to proc. I have one also but do not know the proc level and have not had it proc for me.

QuoteReply
# May 19 2003 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785424264

I have had this weapon for some time, and it has worked pretty well with my lvl 25 warrior. does as much as 72 damge but must it will do between 30 to 56 at lvl 25

Edited, Mon May 19 16:21:10 2003
▲ Page top
sweet item
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2002 at 10:56 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781982405
1 post
SWEET!! This weapon is great! I sold a few pelts and spiderling silks and had like 60pp on my so I figured I'd take a run to the bazaar to look for some armor. I found this selling for 50pp and had to pick it up! Others were selling it for 500pp and I think this may have been a typo! Either way I got a great deal! My 2hs skill was lagging since I was 1hs before, but even with the low skill I average 29 a hit with my level 12 warrior! I think I will have this badboy for awhile!

Dbol
12 Barbarian Warrior
Saryrn

QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2002 at 3:09 PM Rating: Default

Drops off the first Golem in Hole, right before the courtyard.
▲ Page top
Can drop at zone-in
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 2:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247010486
Scholar
360 posts
Doing an XP group at zone in, we had this Blade drop the other night. It had to come from an Elemental Warrior, Crusader, or Rock Golem.

Defaulted it to the WAR in group - it's really a nice axe if the Haste is indeed a proc, since it'll stack with item Haste.

Just to add - it's gotta be super-duper-rare at zone in, we were ther a good 6 hours and we saw this axe and 2 pieces of Loam (Choker and Armice).
